steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• "$16x=30$": Subtracting 30 from 190 gives 160, not 30. Eliminated.
  • "$16x=130$": $190 - 30 = 160 \neq 130$. Eliminated.
  • "$16x=160$": Subtracting 30 from both sides of the original equation gives exactly $16x = 160$. That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
  • "$16x=190$": That would mean 30 was never subtracted. Eliminated.
